hero.title: Your hardware repair assistant.
hero.sub: Give me your device and the symptom — I'll build the knowledge and open the diagnostic.
hero.device_placeholder: Device (e.g. MNT Reform motherboard, iPhone 11, Framework 13)
hero.symptom_placeholder: Symptom (e.g. won't power on, no charge, black screen)

status.checking: Saving your repair and checking whether I already know this device…
status.rule_match: I already know this case ({rule_id}). Opening the diagnostic…
status.device_known: I already know {device}. Opening the diagnostic…
status.expand: I know {device}. Adding your specific symptom (~3 min).
status.build_new: New to me — building the sheet in the background. Feel free to watch.
status.ws_lost: Pipeline connection lost. Reload the page if nothing moves.
status.validation_device: Be more specific about the device — at least a few words.
status.validation_symptom: Describe the symptom a bit more.

delete.confirm: Delete this repair? The conversation and the agent's notes will be permanently erased.
